scripts.help:
printf '
  giraffegotchi commands

  bun setup       one-time: create .venv + install Pillow (art pipeline)
  bun compile     build firmware (esp32dev)
  bun upload      flash firmware
  bun uploadfs    flash sprites (data/) to LittleFS
  bun flash       firmware + sprites
  bun native      run the unit tests (43, host-native)
  bun monitor     serial monitor
  bun prep [sp]   process art (all species, or one: bun prep giraffe)
  bun run help    this list

'
